Changelog

**NOTE: Notification settings have been reset. Sorry.**

- Added notification support to allow selecting Guilds 1–6 individually instead of a single combined option
- Added a global cooldown setting for notification sounds that is applied per channel
- Added an option to hide the initial `(press Enter to chat)` hint in the chat input box
- Added an option to suppress guild `Message Of The Day` chat messages
- Added an optional `/self` command to quickly send private messages to yourself
- Fixed an issue where chat did not update when switching active guilds
- Fixed an issue where the "show chat without background" option did not refresh properly"},{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/mriot/better-chat-releases/releases/289051228","assets_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/mriot/better-chat-releases/releases/289051228/assets","upload_url":"https://uploads.github.com/repos/mriot/better-chat-releases/releases/289051228/assets{?name,label}","html_url":"https://github.com/mriot/better-chat-releases/releases/tag/2026.3.13.1044","id":289051228,"author":{"login":"mriot","id":24588573,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjI0NTg4NTcz","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/24588573?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/mriot","html_url":"https://github.com/mriot","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/mriot/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/mriot/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/mriot/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/mriot/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/mriot/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/mriot/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/mriot/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/mriot/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/mriot/received_events","type":"User","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"node_id":"RE_kwDOQxZKAc4ROpJc","tag_name":"2026.3.13.1044","target_commitish":"main","name":"Better Changelog

## 🪄 "Colorful Chat" becomes "Better Chat" 🪄

- Added an option to change the squad channel tag from `[S]` to `[Squad]`.
- Added an option to adjust the chat window size without the game's upper size restrictions.
- Added an XXL text size option that increases the native maximum chat font size by ~50%.
- Added an option to enable sound notifications for Squad, Party and Guild chats.
- Added an option to enable in-world speech bubbles for guild chats.
- **Experimental**: Chat will now keep its scroll position during edits (can be toggled off in Addon Settings)
- Settings UI got an update and is now better organized in tabs.

---

Thanks Raseus for the new name suggestion!
Thanks Bird for testing :)"},{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/mriot/better-chat-releases/releases/281280027","assets_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/mriot/better-chat-releases/releases/281280027/assets","upload_url":"https://uploads.github.com/repos/mriot/better-chat-releases/releases/281280027/assets{?name,label}","html_url":"https://github.com/mriot/better-chat-releases/releases/tag/2026.1.29.1293","id":281280027,"author":{"login":"mriot","id":24588573,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjI0NTg4NTcz","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/24588573?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/mriot","html_url":"https://github.com/mriot","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/mriot/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/mriot/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/mriot/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/mriot/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/mriot/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/mriot/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/mriot/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/mriot/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/mriot/received_events","type":"User","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"node_id":"RE_kwDOQxZKAc4Qw_4b","tag_name":"2026.1.29.1293","target_commitish":"main","name":"Guilds Changelog

- Added support for Guilds 1–6. Set custom colors for each guild.
- Added an option to dim/darken inactive guild chats.
- Added an option to override the customized active guild color with the `Guild Active` color.
- Added an XL Text Size option that increases the maximum chat font size by ~20%.
- Added an **experimental** option to increase the chat history limit from 200 to 1000 entries.

Under the hood, many improvements were made, hopefully increasing resilience against game updates.

**Please report any bugs you may find :)**

---

Special thanks to Nyx, ThainTrucido, Britt, Raseus, and other members of the Raidcore community for their suggestions, ideas, and feedback. It is much appreciated.

Changelog

- Added a text contrast option  
- Added support for individual styling of combat heal messages  
- Added transparency support for chat messages (channel-specific support is being looked into)  
- Loading and unloading the addon now automatically applies and removes custom colors  

## Internal
- Added support for custom display types (foundation for G1–G6 support and more)
